summary: 20 test cases designed across two independent roles (tester + security-ux). 17 executable immediately (12 unit, 5 API integration); 3 E2E deferred to task #19 (deploy) where real vercel dev + Playwright are available. Coverage: OUT-1..OUT-6, regressions B1/B2/B3/B4, security S2/S4, a11y on EmptyOnboarding. Merged plan at test-plan.md.
